metadata.name: OTA Update to Improve EV Charging Speed

description: The manufacturer releases an OTA update for EVs to improve DC fast charging speeds.

nodes.task_description: Identify the population of eligible vehicles for the update.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of all affected VINs.

nodes.task_description: Push the update to all eligible vehicles and send a notification to owners via their mobile app explaining the benefit.

expected_outcome.value: The update is deployed, and a notification is sent out.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the installation success rate over the next few weeks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent tracks a dashboard showing the percentage of vehicles that have successfully installed the update.
